summary: Master Elric and the protagonist discuss their past bond, with Master Elric seemingly holding a superior position. The conversation is interrupted by the arrival of Merbinger, who reveals that he was tasked with taking control of the war from his father. The protagonist expresses frustration and questions Merbinger's skills, but ultimately acknowledges their failure.
key_moments: Master Elric discloses his past bond
Merbinger arrives to take control of the war
The protagonist confronts Merbinger about their failed mission
